use_cases: Display keyboard shortcuts and hotkeys in documentation or help menus
Interactive keyboard visualization for tutorials and onboarding flows
Keycap display for code editor or productivity tool interfaces
ai_summary: A skeuomorphic keyboard key component with 3D depth effects that responds to physical keyboard presses, mouse clicks, and touch interactions. Features dual-layer construction with animated shadow that simulates real key travel. Supports keyCode binding for keyboard event synchronization and includes optional sublabels for modifier key combinations.
